claim: MC pattern inferences become more testable when every proposed relationship includes counterfactual predictions, null-result criteria, source boundaries, privacy limits, and safe routing before promotion.
missingness: explicit_missingness_required; missing values must not be converted into absence or resolution
revision_reason: Adds a counterfactual/null-result gate so MC pattern packets cannot be promoted from resonance or repeated observation alone.
falsification_route: A packet fails if it lacks counterfactual prediction, null-result criteria, source boundary, measurable variables, privacy state, or safe next action.

records.missingness: timing precision and external context are incomplete; uncertainty is retained
records.revision_reason: Convert repeated symbolic/subjective pattern into operational prediction packet.
records.falsification_route: If the predicted context shift does not change the specified observable variables across repeated records, keep the claim in contradiction ledger or downgrade it.
records.proposed_pattern: When a context-switch note appears, the next useful inference should become more concrete within the prediction window.

counterfactual_predictions.if_pattern_is_wrong: Context-switch notes will not increase operational specificity compared with adjacent non-switch notes.
counterfactual_predictions.observable_difference: No increase in measurable_variable_count or safe_next_action_present rate.

counterfactual_predictions.if_pattern_is_right: Context-switch notes will more often produce a named variable, boundary condition, and safe next action.
counterfactual_predictions.observable_difference: Increase in named-variable count and safe-action completion rate.

null_result_criteria: No measurable-variable increase after three comparable synthetic records
No safe next action generated in at least two comparable records
Source boundary missing or unchanged across reviewed examples

promotion_decision.uncertainty_statement: This is a testable organization rule, not proof that a cognitive or nervous-system mechanism exists.

records.next_executable_action: Score three future MC packets for whether context-switch notes increase measurable-variable count and safe next action specificity.

records.revision_reason: Negative control showing what the gate must reject.
records.proposed_pattern: The pattern is proven because it felt accurate.
